section_id: Rule on Cancellation or Revocation of Special Recruitment Authority
title: Cancellation or Revocation of Special Recruitment Authority
content: The Administration may cancel or revoke a special recruitment authority issued to an agency for violation of the conditions set in the authority such as venue, representative, duration and compliance with these rules.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
